title: VR Angel 4 x 7m Traditional Christmas Wrapping Paper | Easy to Cut-Fold Stylish Gift Wrap Paper Rolls in 4 Assorted Festive Designs for Gift Wrap, Party Favors & Seasonal Decorations
features: 🎄 𝐆𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐬 𝐕𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐞 𝐏𝐚𝐜𝐤 – Includes 4 rolls of premium wrapping paper, each 7 metres long, giving you a total of 28 metres of festive gift wrap to cover gifts of all shapes and sizes with ease.
✨ 𝐓𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐂𝐡𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐬 𝐃𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐬 – Features 4 assorted festive prints in classic holiday patterns, perfect for adding a warm, timeless, and seasonal charm to every Christmas present.
🎁 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐮𝐦 𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐏𝐚𝐩𝐞𝐫 – Crafted from high-quality paper that is durable, smooth, and easy to fold without tearing, ensuring your gifts look elegant and well-presented.
✂️ 𝐒𝐦𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐡 𝐂𝐮𝐭 & 𝐅𝐨𝐥𝐝 – Designed for convenience, the wrapping paper cuts cleanly and folds neatly, helping you achieve professional, tidy finishes every time you wrap.
🏠 𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐥𝐞 𝐅𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐔𝐬𝐞 – Ideal for Christmas gift wrapping, party favors, seasonal decorations, arts & crafts, and school projects, making it a must-have for holiday celebrations.
